summary: Independent QA review accepts M7-BETA-CULTURE-REVIEW-001 as Beta culture/history/language review evidence only. The evidence file and writer REVIEW handoff keep accepted items scoped to Beta evidence, preserve formal content lock as a future Human Gate, give precise request-change/blocked/Human Gate findings with paths, source records, claim records, uncertainty labels, and rationales, preserve M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 as a future UI/localization/visual dependency, and do not authorize UI implementation or product content lock. No product code, package code, app code, tools, Gate docs, roadmap, status, release, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, or manual node battle scope was changed.

tests_run.result: Initial QA pre-handoff worktree was clean.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse checks for project/tasks/active/M7-BETA-CULTURE-REVIEW-001.json and content-source/m7-beta-culture-review/beta-culture-review-evidence.json

tests_run.result: No whitespace errors before QA handoff creation.
Changed paths are content-source evidence and project process/message/task state only; no forbidden apps/packages/tools/.github/docs Gate/roadmap/status/release paths were touched.

tests_run.command: node -e evidence shape check for task/evidence contract
tests_run.result: SHAPE_OK: route qa_reviewer, notContentLockAcceptance true, acceptedForFormalContentLock false, accepted/request-change/blocked/Human Gate/UI-visual constraint findings present, and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preserved.

M7-BETA-CULTURE-REVIEW-001 is REVIEW; M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 is REVIEW; upstream M7 historical/cultural/language, scenario/person/event, tutorial/hints/encyclopedia, and audio/art/localization tasks are CLOSED.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is the only ready task while culture review and visual handoff reviews remain active.
VALID visual handoff envelope; it remains pending systems_architect review and is not implementation authorization.
Content validation passed for m1, m2, m3, m6 map, m6 scenario, and m7 beta scenario/person/event set; M7 manifest hash 92aed91e.

decisions.reason: Accepted findings in beta-culture-review-evidence.json are scoped to review evidence, composite Beta content path, high-risk routing, derived guidance evidence, neutral static slot coverage, and future UI directive constraints. The evidence sets acceptedForFormalContentLock to false.

Request-change, blocked-for-production, and Human Gate findings cite concrete content paths/jsonPaths or supporting message paths, source records, claim records, uncertainty labels, severity where applicable, required changes, and reviewer rationale.
The evidence and writer handoff state notContentLockAcceptance true and preserve formal content lock acceptance as a future Human Gate.

M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 and M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 are treated as future UI/localization/visual quality-track constraints pending systems/QA review, not as substitutes for culture review and not as UI implementation authorization.

Task files, evidence, visual handoff, and searched references keep manual node battle deferred and do not create a M7/M8 blocking manual node battle implementation, spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency.

Base-to-HEAD diff contains only content-source evidence and project process/message/task state; forbidden product code, package, app, tool, Gate, roadmap, status, release, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, and manual node battle paths are untouched.

risks.summary: Formal content lock and major cultural-risk decisions remain future Human Gates; this ACCEPT is not production historical certainty or content lock acceptance.

Culture-specific art, music, symbols, sacred imagery, scripts, clothing, architecture, weapons, names, titles, and transliterations remain blocked from production acceptance until source-specific cultural/language review and Human Gate where required.

M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 is still in REVIEW with systems_architect. Lead integration should reconcile that systems review state before converting visual guidance into UI/localization implementation tasks.
Some candidate sources remain metadata-only or source-discovery-only; future content lock must keep those claims RESEARCH REQUIRED unless page/section evidence is added.

requested_action: lead accept/integrate after systems review state is reconciled where needed.
